title.en: NMPA Published Revised Classification Catalogue for Medical Devices (2025 Edition)
title.zh: NMPA 发布修订版医疗器械分类目录（2025年版）

summary.en: The National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) published the revised Medical Device Classification Catalogue (2025 Edition), effective from January 1, 2026. Key changes include updated classification rules for AI-assisted diagnostic software, new entries for combination products, and revised risk classifications for several device categories. Manufacturers should review product registrations against the new catalogue.
summary.zh: 国家药品监督管理局（NMPA）发布了修订版《医疗器械分类目录》（2025年版），自2026年1月1日起实施。主要变化包括更新了AI辅助诊断软件的分类规则、新增了组合产品条目，以及修订了多个器械类别的风险分类。制造商应根据新目录审查产品注册情况。
